name: Golden Crab Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove crusts from bread and cut slices into cubes.
2. Beat eggs, milk, and seasonings in a bowl.
3. Stir in bread cubes, cheese, and crab meat until combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a 9-inch by 13-inch baking dish.
5. Bake uncovered at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour or until the center is set.
6. Optionally, substitute with 2 cups of shrimp (or a combination of shrimp and crab) to total 2 cups.
